scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run server:dev" "npm run client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.electron:dev: npx concurrently "npm run server:dev" "npm run client" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx electron . --dev"
scripts.electron:build: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && npx electron .
